entry.title: New: RES24-192 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
APPROVING A COMMUNICATIONS SITE LEASE AGREEMENT WITH STC TWO, LLC FOR ITS EXISTING TELECOMMUNICATIONS FACILITY WITHIN THE LĀʻIE CORPORATION YARD, 56-020 KAMEHAMEHA HIGHWAY, LĀʻIE,, OʻAHU, HAWAIʻI, TMK: 5-6-006:001 .

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site
